name: geppetto-cli
description: Initialize Geppetto agent guidance files in a project

scripts.docs:check: node ./lib/knowledge-check.js && node ./lib/agent-entry-check.js && node ./lib/feature-matrix-check.js && node ./lib/upstream-version-check.js && npm run e7:delivery -- --validate-only
scripts.test: node --test tests/cli/init.test.js tests/cli/templates.test.js tests/cli/pack.test.js tests/cli/knowledge.test.js tests/cli/agent-entry.test.js tests/cli/feature-matrix.test.js tests/cli/upstream-version-check.test.js tests/cli/upstream-impact-map.test.js tests/cli/upstream-diff-check.test.js tests/cli/upstream-pr-template.test.js tests/cli/new-manifest.test.js tests/cli/new.test.js tests/cli/test-command.test.js tests/cli/e7-readiness.test.js tests/cli/e7-delivery-packet.test.js tests/cli/platform-config.test.js tests/cli/platform-state.test.js tests/cli/platform-deploy.test.js tests/cli/platform-solana-adapter.test.js tests/cli/platform-encore-adapter.test.js tests/cli/platform-output.test.js tests/cli/deploy-command.test.js tests/cli/deploy-smoke.test.js
scripts.test:escrow-client-alignment: cargo test --manifest-path examples/escrow/Cargo.toml --test generate_fixtures && tsx examples/escrow/tests/client_alignment.ts
